description: Exercises cookie save/load (env-var and file) against a local httpbin container. One ordered test so the container lifecycle wraps the cookie operations: the container is started (and waited on) in the first steps and removed in the last, and because steps within a test always run sequentially this is safe under concurrentRunners>1. Doesn't run on macOS (the runner has no Docker — ARM-based macOS doesn't support nested virtualization) or Windows (the runner only allows Windows containers).

tests.description: Start httpbin in Docker, round-trip env-var and file cookies, then remove the container.

steps.runShell: docker rm -f dd-httpbin 2>/dev/null || true; docker pull kennethreitz/httpbin && docker run -d --name dd-httpbin -p 8080:80 kennethreitz/httpbin
